items.title: Salt returns home for scans after being sidelined with injured finger
items.summary: RCB are expecting Phil Salt to rejoin them for some part of IPL 2026, with Jacob Bethell likely to get an extended run in the meantime
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Patrick Mahomes injury update: Positive news as Chiefs QB prepares for OTAs this month
items.summary: Kansas City Chiefs QB Patrick Mahomes may join OTAs this month after knee surgery in December.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Relay team grab bronze at worlds on another red letter day for Australian athletics
items.summary: Men’s 4x400m time of 2:55.20 breaks national record set day earlier Time would have won gold at every Olympics apart from Paris 2024 Australia secured a thrilling bronze and ran...
items.whyItMatters: Running and athletics widen the page beyond match coverage into performance and training stories.
